title: When setting values for linked tables (board A <-> board B) I have to set both ways seperately

posts.author: niemayd (Michael Kail)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everybody!

I just started working with monday’s GraphQL api and will doing some tests I figured out a strange behavior. When linking board A with board B, I can see that association in board B, but not in board A.

To make it more obvious, when using contacts and accounts from default crm folder, I can associate a contact with an account. But it does not work the other way automatically. So contact John has set account ACME, but account ACME does not have set contact John.

Is there some logic I am missing or does it just work that way?

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @niemayd and welcome to the community!

I hope you like it here

I would love to continue this flow and take a closer look into this!

Would you please send us an email to appsupport@monday.com so we can chat?

Looking forward to hearing from you

Cheers,
Matias
